categories.label: Stats & leaderboards
categories.blurb: Caller stats, bot stats, time windows

categories.label: Guides & command list
categories.blurb: Long-form guides and full command index

entries.helpText:
Use **`!ping`** for a quick alive check.

Use **`!status`** to confirm the bot reports online and ready.

**`!call <contract>`** creates an **official call**: the coin is tracked, you get caller credit, and the usual call embed/chart flow runs.

Use a valid Solana contract address (CA).
**`!watch <contract>`** adds the token to tracking **without** caller credit â€” useful for monitoring only.

**`!tracked`** shows a summary of tracked coins.

**`!tracked <ca>`** refreshes and shows detail for one contract.

**`!ca <ca>`** shows compact token intel **without** adding tracking.

**`!scan`** runs a random-style scanner test; **`!scan <ca>`** deep-scans one token (no tracking).

**`!caller <name>`** or **`!caller @user`** shows caller stats.

**`!callerboard`** ranks callers; **`!botstats`** shows aggregate McGBot auto-call stats.
Time-window commands include **`!bestcall24h` / `week` / `month`**, **`!topcaller24h` / `week` / `month`**, and **`!bestbot24h` / `week` / `month`** for bot calls.
**`!resetstats`** resets your tracked-stat flags. Moderators can use **`!resetstats @user`** for someone else.

**`!profile`** / **`!myprofile`** opens your caller profile (with **Verify X** when it is your own profile).

Use **`!credit anonymous`**, **`!credit discord`**, or **`!credit xtag`** to choose how your name shows on calls.

X verification is also done in the **#verify-x** channel or via profile buttons â€” not the mod **`!verifyx @user`** command.

**`!scanner`** shows ON/OFF.

**`!scanner on`** starts monitoring + auto-call (requires **Manage Server**).

**`!scanner off`** stops loops.

State is saved in **`data/botSettings.json`**.

Mods use **`!approvalstats`**, **`!pendingapprovals`**, and **`!verifyx @user`** (Manage Server) for queues and X verification.

Bot-call approvals also flow through **#mod-approvals** (buttons).

**`!monitorstatus`** summarizes monitor state.

**`!recentcalls`** lists recent bot-tracked calls.

**`!resetmonitor`** is **destructive** (clears tracked coins, stops scanner) â€” mod/owner tooling.

**`!devleaderboard`** shows the dev leaderboard.

**`!addlaunch <dev_wallet> <token_ca>`** logs a launch on a tracked dev (when used in the right context).

**`!testreal <ca>`** runs a live provider test (embed).

**`!autoscantest`** simulates auto alerts (optional profile).

**`!testx`** posts a test tweet (owner/restricted â€” see command list).

**`!guide`** DMs long-form guides based on your role (beginner/user/mod/admin).

**`!commands`** DMs the **full command list** (with mod/owner sections if you have access).

This **`!help`** command answers **topic questions** from the knowledge base.

Scanner thresholds and sanity filters (e.g. **`!setminmc`**, **`!setminliq`**, **`!setsanityminmc`**, **`!setapprovalladder`**) are **bot-owner only** and require **`BOT_OWNER_ID`**.

See **`!commands`** for the full owner command list.
